name: knowledge_base_search
description: Search the Knowledge Base using semantic similarity (ChromaDB + bge-m3 embeddings). Searches indexed content from followed accounts across all platforms. Supports domain filtering, account-scoped queries, time ranges, language filtering, and source-type filtering. Always prefer this over web_search for questions about sources you follow. Results include published_at age for freshness assessment.

query.description: Semantic search query. Write as a natural language question or topic description.

domain.description: KB knowledge domain(s) to scope the search. Domain IDs are defined in kb_domains.yaml. Omit or null to search all domains. Multiple domains use OR logic.

account.description: Filter results to specific account ID(s) from kb_accounts. Use when user asks 'what did [person] say about...'. Omit to search all accounts.

source.description: Filter by content source type: 'website', 'twitter', 'nostr', 'youtube', 'podcast', 'rumble', 'manual', or any custom source_tag defined in kb_domains.yaml bootstrap_sources.

since.description: Return only content published after this date. Accepts: ISO 8601 date ('2025-01-01'), relative shorthand ('7d', '30d', '6m', '1y', '24h'), or null for no filter.

until.description: Return only content published before this date. ISO 8601 or relative shorthand. Null for no filter.

language.description: Filter results to a specific content language. ISO 639-1 code: 'en', 'pl'. Null returns all languages. Note: bge-m3 handles cross-lingual semantic matching natively — this filter restricts result language, not query language.

collection.description: ChromaDB collection to search. 'kb_content' (default) = full text corpus. 'kb_summaries' = per-article summaries (faster, good for brief generation). 'kb_graph_ctx' = account descriptions.

n_results.description: Number of results to return. Default 20. Max 50.

sort_by.description: Result ordering. 'date_desc' (default) = newest first — always use this for 'latest', 'recent', 'what happened' queries. 'relevance' = by semantic similarity score — use for 'what does X say about Y' deep-dive queries. 'date_asc' = oldest first, for trend/evolution queries.

user_id.description: User whose KB to search. Defaults to 'default'. Set from calling session context to enforce user isolation (G27).

published_age.description: Human-readable age: '3 days ago', '6 months ago'. Include in answers for freshness context (G19).

contradicts_chunk_id.description: If non-empty: the ID of a known contradicting chunk from a different account (G8). Use to surface 'Sources disagree on this' warnings in UC8.

account_found.description: False if account filter was specified but no matching account exists in KB. When False: do NOT report 'no results' — instead inform user the account is not tracked and offer to add it (G24).

extended_window.description: True if skill auto-retried with wider time range because fewer than 3 results were found (G10).

resolved_account.description: Non-null when the account param was fuzzy-resolved to a different ID: e.g. '"Macro Alf"→macro_trading_floor(0.95)'. Mention this in your answer so the user knows which account was searched.
